opsworks.stack.stackconfigmanager.Name.Docs: The name. This parameter must be set to `Chef`.

opsworks.stack.stackconfigmanager.Versio.Docs: The Chef version. This parameter must be set to 12, 11.10, or 11.4 for Linux stacks, and to 12.2 for Windows stacks. The default value for Linux stacks is 12.
